references.title: Rent control effects in Spanish metropolitan areas: A quasi-experimental analysis
references.findings: Rent caps reduced available rental stock by 12% while lowering rents by 5% in regulated zones

references.title: Housing affordability interventions in Southern Europe: A meta-analysis
references.findings: Mixed results: demand-side subsidies more effective than supply-side regulation in improving affordability

references.title: Social housing expansion impact on vulnerable populations in Barcelona
references.findings: Social housing protections prevented 8,000 evictions and stabilized neighborhoods

references.title: Dual vocational training outcomes in Spain: PISA evidence
references.findings: FP dual programs reduce youth unemployment by 15% compared to traditional academic tracks

references.title: Curriculum reform impacts on STEM enrollment: European RCT evidence
references.journal: Journal of the European Economic Association
references.findings: Early STEM exposure increases university enrollment in technical fields by 22%

references.title: Primary care integration of mental health services: Spanish pilot results
references.findings: Integrated mental health in primary care reduced specialist referrals by 30% and improved patient outcomes

references.title: SME tax incentives and innovation output in Mediterranean economies
references.findings: R&D tax credits increase patent applications by 10% but primarily benefit larger SMEs

references.title: Renewable energy transition costs in Southern European grid systems
references.findings: Accelerated coal phase-out feasible with 15% increase in grid investment; net positive by 2035

references.title: Just transition failures: Lessons from Asturias mining communities
references.findings: Past transitions left 40% of mining workers without viable alternatives within 5 years
